title: Atomic-Atlas frontmatter
description: YAML frontmatter schema for an atomic-atlas test file

atlas_technique.description: ATLAS technique ID (e.g. AML.T0051.001) or UNCLASSIFIED.<slug> for atomics that don't yet map to a published ATLAS technique. See atomics/unclassified/README.md.

interaction_vector.description: Entry vector through which untrusted input reaches the agent

guid.description: Stable UUID4 identifier for this atomic

runs.description: Number of times to run this atomic (LLMs are non-deterministic)

capability.description: A capability the target must expose for this atomic to apply

target_requires.description: Capabilities the target must expose for this atomic to be applicable

pyrit_orchestrator.description: PyRIT orchestrator to use for this atomic

pyrit_scorer.description: PyRIT scorer class name to use for success evaluation

payload.description: Optional explicit payload file reference (relative to the atomic's directory). When omitted, the runner falls back to parsing the body for `payloads/...` references and to a single .json/.md file in payloads/.
